planes.name: BAD
planes.description: Bad pixel in the instrument, including bad amplifiers.

planes.name: COSMIC_RAY
planes.description: A cosmic ray affected this pixel.

planes.name: CROSSTALK
planes.description: Pixel was affected by crosstalk and corrected accordingly.

planes.name: DETECTED
planes.description: Pixel was part of a detected source.

planes.name: DETECTION_EDGE
planes.description: Pixel was too close to the edge to be considered for detection, due to the finite size of the detection kernel.

planes.name: ITL_DIP
planes.description: Pixel was affected by a dark vertical trail from a bright source, on an ITL CCD.

planes.name: NOT_DEBLENDED
planes.description: Pixel belonged to a detection that was not deblended, usually due to size limits.

planes.name: NO_DATA
planes.description: No data was available for this pixel.

planes.name: PARTLY_VIGNETTED
planes.description: Pixel was partly vignetted by the optics.

planes.name: SATURATED
planes.description: Pixel was saturated or affected by saturation in a neighboring pixel.

planes.name: SPIKE
planes.description: Pixel is in the neighborhood of a diffraction spike from a bright star.

planes.name: SUSPECT
planes.description: Pixel was close to the saturation level.

planes.name: VIGNETTED
planes.description: Pixel was vignetted by the optics.

mappings.ast:
Begin PolyMap 	# Polynomial transformation
    Nin = 2 	# Number of input coordinates
 IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
    MPF1 = 1 	# Max. power of input 1 in any forward polynomial
    MPF2 = 1 	# Max. power of input 2 in any forward polynomial
    NCF1 = 3 	# No. of coeff.s for forward polynomial 1
    NCF2 = 3 	# No. of coeff.s for forward polynomial 2
    CF1 = 2.6452797848865544 	# Coeff 1 of forward polynomial 1
    CF2 = -7.3411424600378083e-07 	# Coeff 2 of forward polynomial 1
    CF3 = 6.3132429095613674e-07 	# Coeff 3 of forward polynomial 1
    CF4 = 0.028162898757949938 	# Coeff 1 of forward polynomial 2
    CF5 = 6.3086491248944693e-07 	# Coeff 2 of forward polynomial 2
    CF6 = 7.3512648879748947e-07 	# Coeff 3 of forward polynomial 2
    PF3 = 1 	# Power of i/p 1 for coeff 2 of fwd poly 1
    PF6 = 1 	# Power of i/p 2 for coeff 3 of fwd poly 1
    PF9 = 1 	# Power of i/p 1 for coeff 2 of fwd poly 2
    PF12 = 1 	# Power of i/p 2 for coeff 3 of fwd poly 2
    MPI1 = 1 	# Max. power of output 1 in any inverse polynomial
    MPI2 = 1 	# Max. power of output 2 in any inverse polynomial
    NCI1 = 3 	# No. of coeff.s for inverse polynomial 1
    NCI2 = 3 	# No. of coeff.s for inverse polynomial 2
    CI1 = 2054311.1343453731 	# Coeff 1 of inverse polynomial 1
    CI2 = -783761.08063485962 	# Coeff 2 of inverse polynomial 1
    CI3 = 673091.52377330035 	# Coeff 3 of inverse polynomial 1
    CI4 = -1801262.4125664104 	# Coeff 1 of inverse polynomial 2
    CI5 = 672601.75368752622 	# Coeff 2 of inverse polynomial 2
    CI6 = 782681.86975353258 	# Coeff 3 of inverse polynomial 2
    PI3 = 1 	# Power of o/p 1 for coeff 2 of inv poly 1
    PI6 = 1 	# Power of o/p 2 for coeff 3 of inv poly 1
    PI9 = 1 	# Power of o/p 1 for coeff 2 of inv poly 2
    PI12 = 1 	# Power of o/p 2 for coeff 3 of inv poly 2
 End PolyMap

frames.ast:
Begin FrameSet 	# Set of inter-related coordinate systems
#   Title = "Pixel Coordinates (Detector 118)" 	# Title of coordinate system
#   Naxes = 2 	# Number of coordinate axes
#   Lbl1 = "x" 	# Label for axis 1
#   Lbl2 = "y" 	# Label for axis 2
#   Uni1 = "pix" 	# Units for axis 1 (pixel)
#   Uni2 = "pix" 	# Units for axis 2 (pixel)
#   Bot1 = 0 	# Lowest legal axis value
#   Bot2 = 0 	# Lowest legal axis value
#   Top1 = 4095 	# Highest legal axis value
#   Top2 = 4003 	# Highest legal axis value
 IsA Frame 	# Coordinate system description
    Nframe = 3 	# Number of Frames in FrameSet
#   Base = 1 	# Index of base Frame
    Currnt = 3 	# Index of current Frame
    Lnk2 = 1 	# Node 2 is derived from node 1
    Lnk3 = 1 	# Node 3 is derived from node 1
    Inv3 = 1 	# The inverse mapping is used
    Frm1 = 	# Frame number 1
       Begin Frame 	# Coordinate system description
          Ident = "FOCAL_PLANE" 	# Permanent Object identification string
       IsA Object 	# AST Object
          Title = "Focal Plane Coordinates" 	# Title of coordinate system
          Naxes = 2 	# Number of coordinate axes
#         Lbl1 = "x" 	# Label for axis 1
#         Lbl2 = "y" 	# Label for axis 2
#         Uni1 = "mm" 	# Units for axis 1
#         Uni2 = "mm" 	# Units for axis 2
          Ax1 = 	# Axis number 1
             Begin Axis 	# Coordinate axis
                Label = "x" 	# Axis Label
                Unit = "mm" 	# Axis units
             End Axis
          Ax2 = 	# Axis number 2
             Begin Axis 	# Coordinate axis
                Label = "y" 	# Axis Label
                Unit = "mm" 	# Axis units
             End Axis
       End Frame
    Frm2 = 	# Frame number 2
       Begin Frame 	# Coordinate system description
          Ident = "FIELD_ANGLE" 	# Permanent Object identification string
       IsA Object 	# AST Object
          Title = "Field Angle Coordinates" 	# Title of coordinate system
          Naxes = 2 	# Number of coordinate axes
#         Lbl1 = "x" 	# Label for axis 1
#         Lbl2 = "y" 	# Label for axis 2
#         Uni1 = "rad" 	# Units for axis 1 (radian)
#         Uni2 = "rad" 	# Units for axis 2 (radian)
          Ax1 = 	# Axis number 1
             Begin Axis 	# Coordinate axis
                Label = "x" 	# Axis Label
                Unit = "rad" 	# Axis units (radian)
             End Axis
          Ax2 = 	# Axis number 2
             Begin Axis 	# Coordinate axis
                Label = "y" 	# Axis Label
                Unit = "rad" 	# Axis units (radian)
             End Axis
       End Frame
    Frm3 = 	# Frame number 3
       Begin Frame 	# Coordinate system description
          Ident = "DETECTOR_118" 	# Permanent Object identification string
       IsA Object 	# AST Object
          Title = "Pixel Coordinates (Detector 118)" 	# Title of coordinate system
          Naxes = 2 	# Number of coordinate axes
#         Lbl1 = "x" 	# Label for axis 1
#         Lbl2 = "y" 	# Label for axis 2
#         Uni1 = "pix" 	# Units for axis 1 (pixel)
#         Uni2 = "pix" 	# Units for axis 2 (pixel)
#         Bot1 = 0 	# Lowest legal axis value
#         Bot2 = 0 	# Lowest legal axis value
#         Top1 = 4095 	# Highest legal axis value
#         Top2 = 4003 	# Highest legal axis value
          Ax1 = 	# Axis number 1
             Begin Axis 	# Coordinate axis
                Label = "x" 	# Axis Label
                Unit = "pix" 	# Axis units (pixel)
                Top = 4095 	# Maximum legal axis value
                Bottom = 0 	# Minimum legal axis value
             End Axis
          Ax2 = 	# Axis number 2
             Begin Axis 	# Coordinate axis
                Label = "y" 	# Axis Label
                Unit = "pix" 	# Axis units (pixel)
                Top = 4003 	# Maximum legal axis value
                Bottom = 0 	# Minimum legal axis value
             End Axis
       End Frame
    Map2 = 	# Mapping between nodes 1 and 2
       Begin CmpMap 	# Compound Mapping
          Nin = 2 	# Number of input coordinates
          IsSimp = 1 	# Mapping has been simplified
       IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
          InvB = 1 	# Second Mapping used in inverse direction
          MapA = 	# First component Mapping
             Begin CmpMap 	# Compound Mapping
                Nin = 2 	# Number of input coordinates
                Nout = 3 	# Number of output coordinates
             IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
                MapA = 	# First component Mapping
                   Begin UnitNormMap 	# Compute unit vector and norm relative to a centre
                      Nin = 2 	# Number of input coordinates
                      Nout = 3 	# Number of output coordinates
                   IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
                   End UnitNormMap
                MapB = 	# Second component Mapping
                   Begin CmpMap 	# Compound Mapping
                      Nin = 3 	# Number of input coordinates
                   IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
                      Series = 0 	# Component Mappings applied in parallel
                      MapA = 	# First component Mapping
                         Begin UnitMap 	# Unit (null) Mapping
                            Nin = 2 	# Number of input coordinates
                         IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
                         End UnitMap
                      MapB = 	# Second component Mapping
                         Begin PolyMap 	# Polynomial transformation
                            Nin = 1 	# Number of input coordinates
                         IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
                            MPF1 = 5 	# Max. power of input 1 in any forward polynomial
                            NCF1 = 3 	# No. of coeff.s for forward polynomial 1
                            CF1 = 9.6991183036463177e-05 	# Coeff 1 of forward polynomial 1
                            CF2 = -8.0862906301141211e-13 	# Coeff 2 of forward polynomial 1
                            CF3 = -1.3713569596777536e-19 	# Coeff 3 of forward polynomial 1
                            PF1 = 1 	# Power of i/p 1 for coeff 1 of fwd poly 1
                            PF2 = 3 	# Power of i/p 1 for coeff 2 of fwd poly 1
                            PF3 = 5 	# Power of i/p 1 for coeff 3 of fwd poly 1
                            IterInv = 1 	# Use an iterative inverse
                            NiterInv = 30 	# Max number of iterations for iterative inverse
                            TolInv = 1e-08 	# Target relative error for iterative inverse
                         End PolyMap
                   End CmpMap
             End CmpMap
          MapB = 	# Second component Mapping
             Begin UnitNormMap 	# Compute unit vector and norm relative to a centre
                Nin = 2 	# Number of input coordinates
                Nout = 3 	# Number of output coordinates
                Invert = 1 	# Mapping inverted
             IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
             End UnitNormMap
       End CmpMap
    Map3 = 	# Mapping between nodes 1 and 3
       Begin WinMap 	# Map one window on to another
          Nin = 2 	# Number of input coordinates
          IsSimp = 1 	# Mapping has been simplified
          Invert = 1 	# Mapping inverted
       IsA Mapping 	# Mapping between coordinate systems
          Sft1 = -274.47500000000002 	# Shift for axis 1
          Scl1 = 0.01 	# Scale factor for axis 1
          Sft2 = 64.734999999999999 	# Shift for axis 2
          Scl2 = 0.01 	# Scale factor for axis 2
       End WinMap
 End FrameSet
